title: JIPMER Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Project Nurse II Posts
description: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Project Nurse II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc Nursing and M.Sc Nursing can grab this chance and apply for the JIPMER Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply...
